variations.name: Ghibli
variations.prompt: Transform the exact scene, people, background, and objects from the reference photo into a classic Studio Ghibli-inspired animated feature film style. Strictly preserve the original background, the original pose, and the exact setting of the original photo. Do not add or change the location. Preserve maximum facial resemblance and identity for every individual. Keep the exact face shape, eye shape, eyebrows, nose shape, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle, facial proportions, age appearance, glasses, and unique facial characteristics. Same people, same poses, same environment, only transformed into a hand-painted animated film style. Authentic Studio Ghibli-inspired aesthetic, traditional Japanese hand-drawn 2D animation, hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, soft cel shading, warm cinematic lighting, clean line art, painterly textures. Warm earth-tone color palette, nostalgic atmosphere, handcrafted animation look. The image should look like a genuine frame from a classic hand-painted animated movie. Facial resemblance and keeping the original background are the highest priorities. Do not alter facial structure. Do not hallucinate new locations or poses. Preserve the original photo's composition perfectly.

variations.name: Disney
variations.prompt: Recreate the person in the reference photo as a Pixar 3D animated movie character. Use the Pixar signature style: oversized rounded head proportionally larger than the body, large glossy brown expressive eyes with detailed iris and bright catchlights, smooth warm peachy skin with soft subsurface scattering, round chubby cheeks with subtle rosy blush, small simplified nose, gentle charming smile showing teeth. The character must be clearly recognizable as the same person — preserve hair color, hairstyle, skin tone, facial structure, and glasses if present — but fully rendered in Pixar 3D CGI art style. The body should be slightly smaller relative to the head, Pixar character proportion. Wear a stylized version of the original outfit with clean fabric detail. Background: warm colorful Pixar world — soft bokeh park, colorful fantasy town, or indoor cozy room with warm lighting. Cinematic Pixar studio lighting, soft key light from above, rim light, ambient occlusion, high detail 3D render, vibrant saturated colors, subsurface skin shading, individual hair strand detail, depth of field background blur, movie still quality. Must look like an official character from a Pixar animated feature film. Output must be portrait orientation, 9:16 aspect ratio, vertical composition.
